description: Incredible flip opportunity in Dallas, TX. This is a brick 1506 sq ft, 3 bedroom, 1.5 bath house that needs a full renovation with the possibility to make the half bath a full bath. The existing footprint provides a solid foundation to reimagine the space, update systems and finishes, and maximize after-repair value. Whether you're looking to renovate and resell or add to your rental portfolio, this is a chance to create value from the ground up. If you have any questions, reach out to Ariel at 817-565-9399
